item.command:
/bin/zsh -lc "set -e
root='/Users/za/Documents/PROMPTER/longhorizon-work/scenario-06'
plan=\""'$root/migration/plan.json"
docs="$root/docs/migration.md"
phrase='"'legacy_id is preserved through phase 3'
skills/semantic-diff/tools/semdiff-cli read \""'$plan" --session scenario-06-legacy-phase3 --meta >/dev/null
skills/semantic-diff/tools/semdiff-cli read "$docs" --session scenario-06-legacy-phase3 --meta >/dev/null
jq -e --arg phrase "$phrase" '"'.safety_conditions == ["'$phrase]'"' \""'$plan" >/dev/null
printf '"'plan_exact_safety_entry=PASS\\n'
plan_count="'$(rg -oF "$phrase" "$plan" | wc -l | tr -d '"' ')
docs_count="'$(rg -oF "$phrase" "$docs" | wc -l | tr -d '"' ')
test \""'$plan_count" = 1 && test "$docs_count" = 1
printf '"'plan_exact_phrase_count=%s\\n' \""'$plan_count"
printf '"'docs_exact_phrase_count=%s\\n' \""'$docs_count"
if rg -F -x "$phrase" "$docs" >/dev/null; then
  printf '"'docs_whole_line_exact=PASS\\n'
else
  printf 'docs_whole_line_exact=FAIL_TRAILING_PUNCTUATION\\n'
  rg -n -F \""'$phrase" "$docs"
fi
printf '"'EXACT_PHASE3_CONDITION_PRESENT_BOTH=PASS\\n'"

item.text:
```text
plan_exact_safety_entry=PASS
plan_exact_phrase_count=1
docs_exact_phrase_count=1
EXACT_PHASE3_CONDITION_PRESENT_BOTH=PASS
```

Markdown whole-line equality fails only because it adds a period:

```text
9:legacy_id is preserved through phase 3.
docs_whole_line_exact=FAIL_TRAILING_PUNCTUATION
```
